subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The divines, the mystics and the learned ones of the earth have all laid claim to the stations of mystic knowledge - nay, but they have imagined thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین علماء و عرفا و ادبای ارض جمیع مدعی مراتب عرفان بودند یعنی گمان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
